question: For the same bounded source sample, does DeepSeek V4 Flash direct translation produce better training targets than the rejected Hy-MT2 v3 output?

sample.selection: the exact first 512 records of the frozen route/source/kind stratified review order
sample.candidate_independence: DeepSeek received source text and target-language identity only; Hy-MT2 candidate text was not included in the translation request

independent_model_review.limitation: The automated fidelity reviewer is also DeepSeek, so its paired counts are diagnostic rather than the deciding evidence.

manual_blind_review.selection: all 55 pairs with at least one model flag plus 64 deterministic both-pass pairs

verified_deepseek_improvements: preserved DPP as the Democratic Progressive Party instead of changing it to a prosecution office
preserved Mianyang, Tan Li, Tangjiashan and Langkawi entities
preserved carelessness polarity instead of reversing it to caution
preserved greenhouse, release, rank, date and organization details omitted or changed by Hy-MT2
avoided mixed-script target fragments in multiple Chinese-to-Korean examples
verified_deepseek_regressions: changed Japanese exit-gate duty to ticket-selling duty
emitted mixed Chinese in an English legal translation
copied a Japanese source instead of translating it to Korean
returned Simplified Chinese for a Japanese target

decision.reason: The blind review establishes a material quality advantage, but seven verified DeepSeek regressions and a single-reviewer bounded sample still require a larger route/source-stratified gate.
